title: Terpenoids : Part LXXXIX. New Syntheses of Perillene and Dendrolasin
author: O. P. VIG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Panjab University, Chandigard-160014. 

  Manuscript received 13 August 1974 ; accepted 9 October 1973.  

  3-(3Furyl) propanol (VII), obtained by a four collins step procedure for two carbons homologa­tion from 3-furylmethanol was oxidised with Collin's reagent to 3-(3-furyl) propanal (VIII). Wittig reaction with isopropylidenetriphenylphosphorane on aldehyde (VIII) provided perillene (I). 

 Grignard reaction of isopropenyl magnesium bromide on (VIII) fornished allyl alcohol (IX) which was converted into its vinyl ether (X) and subsequent pyrolysis of (X) afforded aldehyde(XI). The aldehyde (XI) was subjected to Wittig reaction with isopropylidenetriphenylphosphorane to yield dendrolasin (II).
steps_raw:

The aldehyde (XI) was subjected to Wittig reaction with isopropylidenetriphenylphosphorane to yield dendrolasin (II).
